data.title: Metalpha is suspected of continuing to hoard ETH, with a total withdrawal of 29,000 ETH in 18 days
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @EmberCN monitoring, Metalpha may continue to increase its ETH position. It deposited $25 million USDC to Binance 5 hours ago, and then withdrew 7,000 ETH (about $11.12 million) to the on-chain address 1 hour ago. Since April 1, Metalpha has withdrawn a total of about 29,000 ETH from Binance, with a total value of about $48.73 million, and the average price during the period was about $1,680. The on-chain behavior shows that it continues to build positions within the current price range of ETH.

data.title: Four.Meme's first pre-sale project SkyAI has raised over $25 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to on-chain data, SkyAI, a pre-sale project supported by BNB Chain and Four.Meme platform, has raised 42,714 BNB, worth about 25.28 million US dollars.
It is reported that SkyAI is an MCP framework project based on BNB Chain, which is dedicated to creating multi-chain data services for LLM usage scenarios. The official released its first tweet on April 11. The pre-sale deadline is 4:00 Beijing time on April 19

data.title: HashKey Capital Launches XRP Fund with ETF Vision and Ripple Collaboration
data.description:
TL;DR Asia’s First XRP Tracker Fund: HashKey Capital, based in Hong Kong, has launched the region’s first fund exclusively tracking XRP performance. Flexible, Investor-Friendly Design: With both cash and in-kind subscription options and monthly liquidity for subscriptions and redemptions, the XRP Tracker Fund simplifies exposure to XRP. Strategic Ripple Partnership & ETF Vision: Ripple’s anchor.
source: https://crypto-economy.com/hashkey-capital-launches-xrp-fund-with-etf-vision-and-ripple-collaboration/

data.title: Trump thinks tariffs will revive US manufacturing but economists disagree
data.description:

source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-tariffs-revive-manufacturing/

data.title: Kyrgyzstan Says Yes to Central Bank Digital Currency — Starts Testing “Digital Som”
data.description:
S. and others in Asia are still thinking about the issuance of CBDC, Kyrgyzstan has taken a clear step forward. The country has approved a pilot project for its own digital money called the digital som
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/kyrgyzstan-says-yes-to-central-bank-digital-currency-starts-testing-digital-som/

data.title: Bitwise Brings Bitcoin & Ethereum ETPs on LSE
data.description:
It has officially expanded its European footprint. Bitwise listed four of its institutional-grade crypto ETPs on the London Stock Exchange (LSE). With this move, Bitwise is opening the doors for UK professional investors. They can now access their trusted Bitcoin and Ethereum ETPs on one of Europe’s premier trading platforms
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/bitwise-brings-bitcoin-ethereum-etps-on-lse/
